name: jump2new
description: Marketplace privado jump2new — ecossistema de plugins Wiremaze para Claude Code: wiremaze-base (foundacional), wiremaze-secops (SecOps SaaS eGovernment) e wiremaze-devkit (toolkit de auditoria de developer).

plugins.name: wiremaze-base
plugins.description: Plugin foundacional — vault-toolkit, skills mempalace-doctor e claude-deep-audit, helpers bash partilhados e hook SessionStart de auto-unseal. Instalar primeiro.

plugins.name: wiremaze-secops
plugins.description: Plugin SecOps Wiremaze — Vault, Wazuh, Fortigate, Zabbix, RoR multi-tenant. Assume wiremaze-base instalado.

plugins.name: wiremaze-devkit
plugins.description: Toolkit de auditoria de developer — full-audit, security-scan, infra-audit, ux-audit, code-quality, performance-audit, agente local-reviewer e ngrok-expose. Dependência soft do wiremaze-base.
